metaBuilds.synergy: Stack armor and health early so Adele can land Imperial Lash root then Queen's Garden to lock targets in the Thornbush and survive long enough to matter as support.

items.Dawnstar: Early armor and big regen so you can hold the front line and keep dueling.
items.Xenia: Cheap mixed armor that shields a teammate when you guard them in a fight.
items.Raiment of Renewal: Late huge health and tenacity to shrug off lockdown and out-sustain fights.

metaBuilds.holes: Low burst on her own — Adele leans on landing Imperial Lash and Queen's Garden to lock targets down; whiff them and she mostly just soaks damage.

items.Gaia Greaves: Boots giving armor and speed stacks to chase and stay in melee.
items.Vanguardian: Mixed armor and tenacity core for surviving both damage types.

items.Warden's Faith: Armor that blunts crits and weakens the enemy carry you stick to.
items.Vainglory: Armor that ramps as you stay in the fight tanking shots.
items.Raiment of Renewal: Late huge health and tenacity to shrug off lockdown and out-sustain fights.

items.Solaris: Crit, power and an empowered healing basic to sustain skirmishes.
items.Augmentation: Power, haste and attack speed that empowers your next basic.

items.Alternator: Penetration and power boosting your alternate-ability damage.

optimizer.holes: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Adele leans on landing Imperial Lash and her ultimate; whiff them and she does little.

metaBuilds.synergy: Mix damage and durability so Akeron can pull with Consume, drag them into Crushing Maw and Hellfire while Hunger ramps your healing and trade through extended fights as offlane.

items.Megacosm: Core power with health; its burn chips tanks during your combo.
items.Gaussian Greaves: Power boots adding armor and a mid-air jump for repositioning.
items.Void Helm: Magic armor and health that boosts every heal you take.

metaBuilds.holes: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none — Akeron all-in relies on landing Web Lash and the Consume pull; miss and you're stranded.
